title: alsomitra heterosperma
intro: Alsomitra heterosperma, also known as the "horseshoe calamite," is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and promoting digestion and immune function. In herbal preparations, Alsomitra heterosperma is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
